name: mol
description: Project workflow toolkit organized around the planner→generator→evaluator harness pattern. 19 skills (discuss, spec, litrev, impl, fix, refactor, simplify, review, debug, test, ship, web, docs, note, map, commit, push, pr, tag) + 17 single-axis agents (architect, librarian, debugger, tester, scientist, compute-scientist, optimizer, documenter, spec-writer, undergrad, pm, ci-guard, web-design, security-reviewer, janitor, reviewer, playwright-evaluator) split into producer-write / producer-return / reviewer kinds per rules/agent-design.md. /mol:review is the unified static reviewer — supports --axis=<name> (arch/perf/docs/ux/api/science/numerics/visual/security/hygiene). /mol:simplify is the write-mode applier for janitor's hygiene findings and the single backward-compat gatekeeper invoked by /mol:impl Step 6.5; both enforce the language-canonical toolchain trio (ruff + ty for Python, biome + tsc for TypeScript, cargo fmt + clippy + cargo check for Rust). Heavy drafting is delegated to subagents to keep parent context small: /mol:spec → spec-writer (drafts spec + acceptance.md, returns text); /mol:debug → debugger (root-cause report); /mol:fix Step 2 → debugger (diagnose before patching). Git workflow chain: /mol:pr → /mol:push → /mol:commit → /mol:ship gates; follows the standard GitHub fork convention (origin = your fork, upstream = canonical repo) with no extra config — /mol:tag pushes release tags to upstream while /mol:push goes only to origin. Four-zone layering (docs / .claude/notes / .claude / CLAUDE.md) with active-vs-passive split: notes in .claude/notes/, specs in .claude/specs/ with checkbox-tracked Tasks; /mol:impl ticks the boxes and flips each acceptance criterion's status (pending → verified / failed) at close-out, parking the spec at status: code-complete until runtime-typed criteria (ui_runtime / scientific / performance / docs) flip too, only then advancing to done and deleting the spec. Adapts per project via mol_project frontmatter (Atomiverse, molpy, molexp, molrs, molvis, molq, molnex). Pair with mol-agent for harness install/maintenance.
